productDisplayName: Timberland Men Juniors Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in casual comfort in the timberland Crown Point Fisherman floaters. Designed with leather and rubber, this sandal offers ample breathable comfort and keeps your young one's feet fresh and dry all day long.UpperLeather upper with straps along the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot and has perforations for ultimate comfort and breathabilityHas a nubuck patch along the backfoot for absolute comfortVelcro closure strap on the midfoot to offer a customised FitCushioned foam footbed with a leather lining for sweat-free all-day comfortOutsoleGrippy non-marking rubber outsole with zig-zag lugs for absolute grip and tractionOutsole embeded onto the upper as a heel guard and forefoot foxing for enhanced durabilityFloater careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a branded leather conditioner and brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
